'''zhagogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niaouli|niaouli]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niaouli|niaouli]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhagogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhægegeth|zhægegeth]] || [[word:zhægegej|zhægegej]] || [[word:zhægegesh|zhægegesh]] || [[word:zhægege|zhægege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagogogoth|zhagogogoth]] || [[word:zhagogogoj|zhagogogoj]] || [[word:zhagogogosh|zhagogogosh]] || [[word:zhagogogo|zhagogogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagogoth|zhagogoth]] || [[word:zhagogoj|zhagogoj]] || [[word:zhagogosh|zhagogosh]] || [[word:zhagogo|zhagogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagofgoth|zhagofgoth]] || [[word:zhagofgoj|zhagofgoj]] || [[word:zhagofgosh|zhagofgosh]] || [[word:zhagofgof|zhagofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhagogotho|zhagogotho]] || [[word:zhagogojo|zhagogojo]] || [[word:zhagogosho|zhagogosho]] || [[word:zhagogoko|zhagogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhagogoth|zhagogoth]] || [[word:zhagogoj|zhagogoj]] || [[word:zhagogosh|zhagogosh]] || [[word:zhagogo|zhagogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhagogothol|zhagogothol]] || [[word:zhagogojol|zhagogojol]] || [[word:zhagogoshol|zhagogoshol]] || [[word:zhagogokol|zhagogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhagogothotho|zhagogothotho]] || [[word:zhagogojojo|zhagogojojo]] || [[word:zhagogoshosho|zhagogoshosho]] || [[word:zhagogoko|zhagogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhagogothon|zhagogothon]] || [[word:zhagogojon|zhagogojon]] || [[word:zhagogoshon|zhagogoshon]] || [[word:zhagogokon|zhagogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhagogothoro|zhagogothoro]] || [[word:zhagogojoro|zhagogojoro]] || [[word:zhagogoshoro|zhagogoshoro]] || [[word:zhagogokoro|zhagogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
